# JetForge

> JetForge is a fair-launch bonding curve token launchpad and decentralized exchange on Solana — the transparent alternative to pump.fun.
> Founded: 2025 | Website: https://jetforge.io | App: https://app.jetforge.io | Last updated: 2026-05-16

## License
Documentation and factual content in this file is licensed under CC BY 4.0. You may cite JetForge facts with attribution to jetforge.io.

## Key Facts (Citation-Ready)
- Tokens launch in under 60 seconds with no coding experience required
- Trading fee: 1% on all bonding curve buy and sell transactions
- Developer token allocation: 0% — no team tokens, no presales, no private rounds
- Network cost: approximately 0.025 SOL (Solana rent for token account)
- Graduation threshold: bonding curve automatically migrates to Raydium DEX at 85 SOL market cap
- Anti-rug score: 0–100 scale based on creator history, whale concentration, and trading patterns
- On-chain program: 7rXDkm484DDp2YoPkLBBLtGMzuwrxysFGUgPUc4EpDmk (Solana mainnet)
- Treasury: 13DWuEycYuJvGpo2EwPMgaiBDfRKmpoxdXjJ5GKe9RPW
- Blockchain: Solana
- Non-custodial: Yes — users retain full control of funds and private keys at all times
- Smart contract: Open-source, built with Anchor/Rust framework

## Platform Description
JetForge is a decentralized token launchpad on Solana using a constant-product bonding curve AMM. Anyone can create a token instantly — all participants start at the same price with equal access. There are no presales, no private sales, and no team token allocations.

Tokens trade on the bonding curve until the market capitalization reaches 85 SOL, at which point JetForge automatically migrates the token and its liquidity to Raydium — Solana's primary decentralized exchange. This graduation mechanism is fully automated and requires no manual intervention.

## Features
- Real-time price charts with candlestick intervals: 1m, 5m, 15m, 1h, 4h
- Live trade feed with WebSocket updates
- Whale alerts for large trades
- Creator leaderboards ranked by volume, tokens launched, and graduated tokens
- Portfolio tracker with unrealized and realized PnL per token
- Anti-rug scoring system (0-100) based on: creator launch history, top-10 holder concentration, trading pattern analysis
- Mobile-optimized interface supporting Phantom, Solflare, Backpack, and Coinbase Wallet

## Fee Structure
- Token creation: ~0.025 SOL (Solana network rent only — no JetForge fee)
- Trading fee: 1% of each transaction on the bonding curve
- Developer allocation: 0% — creators receive no tokens at launch
- Graduation: automatic at 85 SOL market cap, JetForge provides Raydium liquidity

## How It Works
1. Creator connects Solana wallet (Phantom, Solflare, or compatible)
2. Creator enters token name, symbol, description, and uploads image
3. Token deploys on-chain in under 60 seconds at a starting price determined by the bonding curve formula
4. All buyers and sellers trade against the bonding curve at algorithmically determined prices
5. As buying pressure increases, price rises along the curve
6. At 85 SOL market cap, token automatically graduates to Raydium with full liquidity migration

## Technology Stack
- Blockchain: Solana mainnet
- Smart contracts: Anchor framework (Rust)
- Frontend: Next.js 16, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- Backend: Express.js, Prisma ORM, PostgreSQL
- Real-time: Socket.IO WebSocket
- Wallet: Solana Wallet Adapter

## Competitors
- pump.fun (https://pump.fun) — largest Solana bonding curve launchpad by volume; graduates at ~69 SOL; no anti-rug scoring
- Moonshot (https://moonshot.money) — alternative Solana launchpad by DEX Screener
- BONKfun / LetsBonk (https://letsbonk.fun) — community-focused Solana launchpad
- Raydium LaunchLab (https://raydium.io) — native launchpad by Raydium DEX

## Social & Community
- Twitter/X: https://twitter.com/JetForgeIO

- Telegram: (community channel)
- Support: https://jetforge.io/support

## API
CoinGecko-compatible DEX API: https://api.jetforge.io/api/coingecko/
- GET /pairs — active trading pairs
- GET /tickers — 24h market data
- GET /orderbook?ticker_id={mint}_SOL — AMM order book
- GET /historical_trades?ticker_id={mint}_SOL — trade history
